title: Dutch Delight Pancakes
description: A fluffy and sweet pancake recipe inspired by Dutch cuisine, topped with a delightful Turkish delight mixture.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, and melted butter.
3. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and whisk until smooth.
4. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
5. Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
6. Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
7. Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, mix together crushed Turkish delight, icing sugar, and lemon juice in a bowl.
9. Once the pancakes are cooked, top with the Turkish delight mixture.
